Directory layout: one folder per suite name, e.g. TestBasicTypes/ (listed in validatorJSONLSuiteDirs in validator_test.go).

Run one suite: go test -run 'TestValidatorJSONLSuites/TestBasicTypes$' ./...

valid.jsonl
  - One line = one schema string passed to Validate (must be valid JSON).
  - Append a line to add a passing case.

invalid.jsonl
  - One JSON object per line:
    {"schema":"<exact schema text>","expect":"<substring of expected error>","unmarshal":false}
  - schema is a JSON string value (escaped), so the document under test need not be valid JSON.
  - unmarshal: true if the implementation must return an UnmarshalError.
